{"authId":"eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..yjzK3f_3bqx-PxluKJsTyv0m0QQsGdWI696zdYrHDwA","callbacks":[{"type":"TermsAndConditionsCallback","output":[{"name":"version","value":"V3.3"},{"name":"terms","value":"

GEODIS Single Sign-On – Terms of Use

1. Definitions

“Terms of Use” refers to the conditions governing your access to and use of the Website.

“Personal data” refers to personal data as defined in the EU regulations added to by our Privacy policy.

“Subsidiaries\" refers to any entity (existing or yet to be set up) that directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under the common control of GEODIS.

”We/Us” or “Our” refers to GEODIS.

”User(s)” or “You” and “Your” refers to any individual who accesses this Website, regardless of whether they log in.

”Website” refers to this website, which is accessible via the URL login.geodis.com

2. Preamble

GEODIS opted to publish this Website, manage it and put it online.

Access to the Website is subject to compliance with the Terms of Use.

Access to and use of the Website imply acceptance of the Terms of Use. The Terms of Use that apply are those that are in force when the User accesses the Website. GEODIS is free to modify all or some of the Terms of Use at any time, including the possibility of additions, amendments or deletions. These changes are deemed to have been brought to the attention of Users by virtue of nothing more than having been posted online. Indeed, the Terms of Use are accessible from the Website’s footer and can therefore be consulted by the User at any time. In any case, once online, the Terms of Use are deemed to have been accepted unreservedly by the User by virtue of their having accessed the Website. Consequently, it is advisable for the User to refer to the Terms of Use each time they access the site, so as to keep abreast of the latest version online.

3. Purpose of the Website

The purpose of the Website is to provide Users with an account creation and authentication scheme enabling access to GEODIS applications.

The following services are accessible through the Website:

  • GEODIS account creation: in order to create a GEODIS account, Users are required to comply with the bot detection solution implemented by GEODIS. In addition, Users wishing to create an account must provide the following information: first name, last name, email address, password.
  • GEODIS account login: once authenticated with their GEODIS account through the Website, Users can access other GEODIS applications without re-entering their credentials.
  • Password management: Users can update or reset their GEODIS account’s password, in accordance with the procedures described by the Website.

The Website does not provide any other service than the services listed above.

4. Access to the Website

GEODIS reserves the right to modify, suspend, restrict or cut access to all or part of the Website, including access to its content, without prior notice.

The User, and any equipment used by the User to access the Website must comply at all times with the laws and regulations that are in force when they do so. Should there be a Website outage caused by a User's hardware, the User must immediately unplug said hardware.

In addition, all Users of the Website are to access it using recent hardware with anti-virus software and an Internet browser of the latest generation. Furthermore, the User undertakes to refrain from using the Website to pass on or store malware (with the example of but not limited to viruses, Trojan horses, scripts or other programs designed with malicious intent) or to disrupt or interfere with the normal operation of the Website.

5. Intellectual property

The Website, as well as all of its constituent parts (including, but not limited to, know-how, trademarks, trade secrets, copy, presentations, tutorials, videos, photographs, downloadable documents, logos, etc.) and related material are protected by intellectual property rights. These include, but are not limited to, copyright,sui generisrights of database producers, domain names, trademarks, logos, etc.), as well as the related rights of GEODIS and/or publishers that have granted GEODIS operating licences.

Except in the event of prior written authorisation having been granted by GEODIS, the User shall not exploit, modify, reproduce, share, edit, translate, adapt, download or publish the Website and/or any of its constituent parts, partially or totally, in any form whatsoever, using any media whatsoever and for any reason whatsoever (commercial, promotional or otherwise).

Any breach of these obligations may constitute an act of counterfeiting, intellectual property right infringement and/or an act of unfair competition or parasitic activity which may result in civil or criminal proceedings against the User.

6. Confidentiality and protection of your personal data

GEODIS will take all necessary administrative, organisational and technical measures for the protection and security of your personal data, as required by legislation and best practice in the industry. Full details of how your data will be used are set out in the Privacy Policy.

GEODIS will not disclose your data unless (i) required to do so by law, (ii) you have granted us written permission to do so or (iii) such disclosure is necessary to provide you with the Website’s functionalities. GEODIS will not pass on your data and undertakes not to disclose it to third parties, including its Group Subsidiaries and entities that directly or indirectly control, are controlled by or are under the common control of GEODIS.

We provide no guarantee that the hosting service will be continuous, totally secure or error-free. You accept the fact that we use an external host, and as such cannot control the actions of this host. By accepting these Terms of Use, You accept the host's terms of use, which can be found on the host's website. Notwithstanding the other provisions of the Terms of Use, and within the confines of applicable law, You acknowledge that we cannot be held responsible for the actions (or failure to act) of the host.

7. Hypertext links

The Website may be used in order to access to other websites owned and/or controlled by GEODIS or GEODIS affiliates. You acknowledge that such websites may be subject to specific terms of use, which the User is solely responsible to accept or not accept.

8. Liability

8.1 Liability of the User

It is the User's responsibility to take all appropriate measures to protect their own data, computer systems and/or software from contamination by any viruses. Users who log into the Website are responsible for all use of their account, including their login, password and e-mail address. It is the User's responsibility to keep their login and password secret, and to ensure that their User account remains secure.

8.2 Reporting and account deactivation

The User agrees to immediately inform GEODIS of any suspected fraudulent use of their account, login or password by an unauthorised third party using the following link. Under no circumstances may GEODIS be held liable for any damage resulting from a breach by the User in this respect.

GEODIS reserves the right to deactivate the User login or password, whether chosen by the User or allocated by GEODIS, at any time, if GEODIS legitimately believes that the User has not complied with the provisions of the Terms of Use.

8.3 Limitation of GEODIS' liability

8.3.1- Errors or inaccuracies

Despite every effort made by GEODIS to roll out and maintain the Website, there may still be errors, inaccuracies or omissions remaining. As a result, GEODIS provides no guarantees over the absence of errors on the Website, the absence of viruses on the platform, or the correction of errors and faults.

8.3.2- Accessibility of the Website

GEODIS will make every effort to ensure that the Website is accessible. However, the connection may be unstable or subject to outages, not least when maintenance is taking place. GEODIS may not, under any circumstances, be held liable for the unavailability of the Website, or for any consequences resulting therefrom, such as loss of profits, turnover, savings, opportunities or data, or for damage to reputation.

GEODIS provides no guarantees pertaining to disruption, risks, access anomalies, Website overload, hacking into the Website by third parties or the presence of viruses on the Website.

8.3.3- Use of the Website

GEODIS may not, under any circumstances, be held liable for the use made of the Website, or for any consequences resulting therefrom, such as loss of profits, turnover, savings, opportunities or data, or for damage to reputation.

9. Applicable Law

The Terms of Use are governed by French law. These Terms of Use constitute the totality of the agreement between GEODIS and the User. They shall override and supersede any prior or current agreement (whether written or verbal) on the same subject, and shall prevail in the event of any conflict with other conditions.

The Terms of Use are governed by French law. In the event of a conflict of interpretation, the French version shall prevail. In the event of a dispute concerning the validity, interpretation and/or application of the Terms of Use, GEODIS and the User agree to meet to seek amicable resolution of their dispute.

In the event that the parties are unable to reach an amicable agreement, any legal action concerning the interpretation, validity and/or application of the Terms of Use will be brought before the Paris courts. This includes cases where there are multiple petitioners and that of legal action by a third party in a bid to secure an emergency or protective ruling.
